ops.body: didyoumean tags->labels finding resolved: landed on main in 08187680 with the fix (argSynonyms tags -> {"labels"}) plus the suggested regression test as TestArgSynonymsResolve in internal/mcpserver/didyoumean_internal_test.go (internal-package variant so argSynonyms/toolset are visible; the reviewer's didyoumean_test.go name would land in package mcpserver_test). The commit also adds TestToolsetRecordsEveryTool guarding raw mcp.AddTool bypass of the props table. Verified green under go test -race 2026-07-17.
